home.title: Networks
home.subtitle: Connect to one or more EasyTier networks at the same time.
home.empty: No networks yet — click “Add network” above to create one.
home.tun_notice_message: VPN mode (the TUN adapter) is disabled. SOCKS5 and port-forward proxies still work. For full VPN, enable “Always launch as administrator” in Settings.

network.title: Network
network.empty_help: You don't have any networks. Add one on the Home page to get started.
network.live_message: Edits are saved now and apply the next time you reconnect it.

general.network_secret_placeholder: everyone on the network uses this
general.tun_name_placeholder: leave blank for the system default
general.standalone_hint: Standalone — other devices connect to this node's listeners (set on the Advanced tab).
general.dhcp_help: Get a virtual IP from the network automatically. Turn off to assign a fixed address.

security.encrypt_help: AES-GCM by default. Only turn this off on a trusted LAN — without it, anyone who captures a packet can read it.
security.private_mode_help: Reject peers whose network name does not match exactly. Without this, anyone who guesses the secret can join even with a different network name.
security.relay_whitelist: Only relay traffic for trusted networks
security.relay_whitelist_help: When acting as a relay, refuse to forward packets for networks not in the list below.
security.magic_dns_help: Resolve peer hostnames (e.g. `laptop.local`) inside this network without any DNS server.

routing.latency_first_help: When more than one route exists, pick the one with the shortest RTT instead of the fewest hops.
routing.subnet_proxy_text: Re-export local subnets to peers so they can reach hosts on your LAN as if those hosts were on the overlay network.
routing.announce_routes_help: Advertise additional CIDRs to peers; they will route traffic to those ranges through this node.
routing.act_as_exit: Act as an exit node for this network
routing.act_as_exit_help: Forward arbitrary internet traffic from other peers through this device.
routing.use_exit_text: Send this device's internet traffic through one of these peers (use their virtual IPs):

proxies.socks5_toggle: Run a SOCKS5 proxy on this device
proxies.socks5_help: Other apps on this machine can route traffic through the EasyTier network by pointing at 127.0.0.1:<port>.
proxies.portal_help: Lets a WireGuard client outside this network dial into the mesh.
proxies.portal_connect_hint: Connect this network to make Polaris publish a WireGuard client config here.
proxies.wg_config_title: WireGuard client config (Ctrl+A then Ctrl+C to copy)
proxies.wg_paste_hint: Paste into any WireGuard client, or
proxies.forwards_text: Forward TCP/UDP ports from this device into the mesh.

advanced.listeners_text: URLs this node binds for inbound connections. Leave the first list empty for EasyTier's defaults (tcp/udp/wg on standard ports).
advanced.mapped_listeners: Mapped listeners (public URLs other peers should dial)
advanced.kcp_proxy_help: Wrap proxied TCP in KCP (TCP-over-UDP). Smoother over lossy links.
advanced.refuse_kcp_help: Don't accept incoming KCP proxies from other peers.
advanced.quic_proxy_help: Wrap proxied TCP in QUIC — useful behind some firewalls.
advanced.refuse_quic_help: Don't accept incoming QUIC proxy sessions.
advanced.smoltcp_help: Bypass the OS TCP stack. Required on devices without TUN.
advanced.disable_ipv6_help: Use IPv4 only. Try this if v6 paths are flaky on your network.
advanced.auto_ipv6_help: Ask STUN for this device's public v6 address.
advanced.udp_broadcast_help: Reflect UDP broadcast/multicast (e.g. mDNS) across the mesh.
advanced.disable_p2p_help: Always relay through a server. Slower but predictable.
advanced.p2p_only_help: Refuse to relay traffic between other peers.
advanced.lazy_p2p_help: Only attempt P2P once real traffic starts.
advanced.require_p2p_help: Refuse to start if P2P could not be established.
advanced.skip_sym_punch_help: Skip the specialized symmetric-NAT punching algorithm.
advanced.disable_upnp_help: Don't auto-open ports on your router.
advanced.relay_rpc_help: Forward control-plane messages between peers (needed on relay servers).
advanced.multi_thread_help: Use the full Tokio pool. Disable on single-core devices.
advanced.forward_by_system_help: Let the kernel route proxied subnets instead of user-space.
advanced.bind_device_help: Pin outbound traffic to one interface. Required on iOS-like systems.
advanced.no_tun_help: Run without a virtual NIC — proxies only (SOCKS5 / port forwards).

peers.subtitle: Devices reachable on your networks.
peers.empty_message: Connect a network to discover its peers.

activity.subtitle: Live events from each running network.
activity.empty: No activity yet. Connect a network to see its events.

settings.subtitle: Application-wide preferences. Network management lives on the Home page.
settings.launch_on_startup_help: Start Polaris automatically at sign-in, hidden in the system tray.
settings.close_to_tray_help: Closing the window keeps Polaris running in the notification area. Use the tray icon's Quit to exit completely.
settings.minimize_to_tray_help: Hide Polaris to the tray instead of the taskbar when you minimize it.
settings.files_help: Polaris stores your networks (config.json), backups, and logs in this folder.
settings.admin_elevated: Running as administrator — VPN (TUN) is available.
settings.admin_not_elevated: Not elevated — VPN mode is disabled; SOCKS5 and port-forward proxies still work.
settings.admin_packaged_not_elevated: Not elevated — VPN mode is disabled; SOCKS5 and port-forward proxies still work. Launch Polaris as an administrator to enable the VPN (requires Windows 11).
settings.always_admin_help: Request UAC elevation on startup so Polaris can create the VPN (TUN) adapter. Takes effect next launch.

about.subtitle: What powers Polaris.
about.desc: A fast, friendly WinUI client for the EasyTier mesh VPN.
about.built_with: Built with windows-reactor (WinUI 3) and the embedded EasyTier core.
about.icon_attribution: App icon from Fluent UI System Icons — © Microsoft, MIT License.
about.license_text: Polaris is free software under the GNU General Public License, version 3, and comes with ABSOLUTELY NO WARRANTY.

diagnostics.subtitle: Logs from Polaris and the embedded EasyTier engine.
diagnostics.verbose_help: Capture verbose logs from Polaris and the EasyTier engine to a file and a Diagnostics page — for deep debugging (e.g. why peers stay on relay vs. going P2P). Separate from and off by default: per-network activity (peer connects, route changes) is always on the Activity page without this.
diagnostics.no_log: No log output yet. Lower the log level (Settings → Diagnostics) and use the app — engine events stream in here.

tray.balloon_body: Click the tray icon to reopen, or right-click it to quit.
